sqlMap.select: select * from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey Years AttorneyName NumberOfYrsInSpec PercentageOfTimeDev LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #Years# #AttorneyName# #NumberOfYrsInSpec# #PercentageOfTimeDev# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyInEntertainKey, Years, AttorneyName, NumberOfYrsInSpec, PercentageOfTimeDev, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where AttorneyInEntertainKey = #AttorneyInEntertainKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW set
Years = #Years# Years = null AttorneyName = #AttorneyName# AttorneyName = null NumberOfYrsInSpec = #NumberOfYrsInSpec# NumberOfYrsInSpec = null PercentageOfTimeDev = #PercentageOfTimeDev# PercentageOfTimeDev = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where AttorneyInEntertainKey = #AttorneyInEntertainKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where AttorneyInEntertainKey = #AttorneyInEntertainKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select AttorneyInEntertainKey, Years, AttorneyName, NumberOfYrsInSpec, PercentageOfTimeDev, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where AttorneyInEntertainKey = #AttorneyInEntertainKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select AttorneyInEntertainKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, Years, AttorneyName, NumberOfYrsInSpec, PercentageOfTimeDev, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AttorneyInEntertainForFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
